basics.name: Camila Duarte
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Backend-leaning software engineer who has spent equal time shipping services and running the infrastructure underneath them.

work.name: NimbusPay
highlights: Lead the redesign of the subscription billing API, now handling 4M+ requests a month.
Cut p95 API latency by 35% by introducing read replicas and query-level caching.

work.name: Vantage Cloud
highlights: Migrated the deploy pipeline to GitHub Actions, cutting release time from 40 to 9 minutes.
Rolled out a shared Terraform module library adopted by 12 product teams.

work.name: Solstice Retail
highlights: Built the checkout service that absorbed the company's Black Friday peak traffic.
Introduced blue-green deploys, eliminating checkout downtime during releases.
Wrote the on-call runbooks the infrastructure team still uses today.

work.name: Aurora Systems
highlights: Rotated across backend, infrastructure, and support work on a small generalist team.
Wrote the team's first automated test suite, raising coverage from 12% to 70%.

projects.name: Payments Reconciliation Service
projects.description: Nightly reconciliation between the payments ledger and the bank settlement feed.
highlights: Replaced a manual spreadsheet reconciliation with an automated nightly job.
Reduced unresolved discrepancies from roughly 40 a month to under 3.

projects.name: Cluster Autoscaler Rollout
projects.description: Workload-aware autoscaling for the shared Kubernetes platform.
highlights: Rolled out cluster autoscaling across 6 production clusters.
Cut idle compute spend by 30% without regressing p95 scheduling latency.

awards.title: Engineering Impact Award
awards.summary: Recognized for leading the subscription billing API redesign.
